overall.description: A smooth cinematic journey through a shallow mountain river in a video game environment (Red Dead Redemption 2). The camera drifts through rocky rapids and along forested banks under a partly cloudy sky, showcasing detailed water physics and natural wilderness with no human presence.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky river shallows with large scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: smoothly drifting through shallow river water navigating between large boulders and rocks

entered.detail: massive gray boulders scattered throughout the shallow river channel
dense evergreen pine forest covering the left hillside
tall pine trees lining the right riverbank
steep rocky cliff face visible in the distance upstream

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a shallow mountain river surrounded by massive boulders. The camera drifts smoothly through the water among scattered rocks, with dense pine forests lining both sides of the valley and a rocky cliff visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open river valley with exposed pebble bars and grassy banks

events.description: camera transitions from rocky shallows to open pebble-strewn river section with visible gravel bars

agents.ego_description: navigating along the river through shallow pebble bars with grassy banks visible on the left

entered.detail: grassy riverbank with green vegetation sloping down to the water
shallow water revealing smooth pebbles and gravel on the riverbed
hazy mountain peaks visible in the far distance down the valley

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the rocky shallows into a more open section of the river with visible pebble bars. The left side features grassy banks while the right side shows rocky outcrops, and distant mountains become visible down the valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep river channel with steep rocky cliffs on the right bank

agents.ego_description: drifting through deeper water section with towering cliffs on the right and open valley ahead

entered.detail: tall steep cliff face with layered rock formations on the right side
vertical rock wall rising prominently from the riverbank
distant mountain peak framed by the valley opening

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving through deeper water with a steep rocky escarpment dominating the right side. The river widens as it flows toward a distant mountain peak, with the surrounding forest receding into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shallow mountain river that gradually opens from a narrow, boulder-strewn valley into a wide vista dominated by distant peaks. It begins by drifting smoothly through rocky shallows surrounded by massive boulders and dense pine forests that line the valley walls. As the camera moves forward, the terrain shifts into a more open stretch of water characterized by pebble bars and grassy banks, allowing distant mountains to emerge on the horizon. The scene then expands as the river widens and the forest recedes, flowing past a steep rocky escarpment on the right before finally heading toward a towering mountain peak in the distance.
